task_name: Not an FLS Task - Educational Presentation
reason_not_scored: This video is an educational/instructional presentation about a low-cost tissue model for laparoscopic colpotomy simulation. It contains title slides, materials lists, cost breakdowns, feedback information, and limitations. This is NOT a performance of an official FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task. While there are brief demonstrations of colpotomy tissue handling and laparoscopic technique practice with actual surgical instruments and pig stomach tissue, the overall content is academic presentation material, not a formal FLS task assessment.
content_observed: Title slide: 'Tissue Model for Laparoscopic Colpotomy Simulation'
Materials needed list (styrofoam balls, candle, foam sheet, packing tape, measuring tape, scissors, box cutter, drillbit, pig stomach)
Setup and assembly demonstration of foam tissue model
Brief laparoscopic technique practice with pig stomach tissue using energy devices and surgical instruments

demonstrated_techniques: Low-cost tissue model construction for colpotomy practice
Laparoscopic instrument handling with pig stomach tissue
Safe practice environment for surgical skill development
common_errors_addressed: Cost and accessibility barriers to simulation training addressed by demonstrating sub-$1 model construction

confidence_rationale: Video classification is certain — this is clearly an academic poster presentation with instructional content about model development, not a scored FLS task performance.
